// compilerOptions: Duplicated from tsconfig.app.json's path aliases so shadcn's `@/*` resolver finds them at the root tsconfig (the file shadcn checks first). The actual TS compile reads from the referenced project configs, not from here — this block exists purely for shadcn's auto-detection when running `npx shadcn add <component>`. Without it, shadcn falls back to treating `@/` as a literal directory and installs primitives at `frontend/@/components/ui/` instead of `frontend/src/components/ui/`.
